sources.name: Prototype Textures
sources.author: Kenney
notes: Official Kenney asset page lists Creative Commons CC0.
OpenGameArt listing identifies Kenney as author and CC0 license.
Only selected steel-toned PNG textures are committed for the foundation floor, walls, and roof.

Runtime textures are deterministic modified derivatives generated by scripts/generate-foundation-metal-textures.mjs to remove prototype grid lines and add colored metal panels, screws, and worn surface detail.
sourceSha256 records the original CC0 Kenney texture hash; optimizedSha256 and sha256 record the committed derivative PNG.

sources.name: Foundation FPS ElevenLabs Audio And Voice
sources.author: ElevenLabs generated output
sources.downloadUrl: build-time ElevenLabs API generation through local secret broker
notes: Generated build-time through the local secret broker; no ElevenLabs key is present in browser code or committed metadata.
Prompt, model, endpoint, voice ID, settings, hashes, byte sizes, and intended use are recorded in source-metadata.json.
Runtime uses cache-busted committed MP3 assets only; character voice previews are lazy-loaded from the title Voice Lab.

assets.prompt: Tight futuristic plasma sidearm shot, punchy laser crack with bright electrical snap and short metallic tail, dry, no ambience, mobile sci-fi FPS weapon SFX.
Wide sci-fi scatter blaster blast, chunky low-mid thump with layered plasma pellets and a short metallic pump tail, dry, no ambience, mobile sci-fi FPS weapon SFX.
Heavy futuristic energy rifle pulse, deep capacitor boom with powerful sci-fi blast, crisp transient, and short bass tail, dry, no ambience, mobile sci-fi FPS weapon SFX.
Focused sci-fi precision blaster shot, bright green ion needle crack with tight snap, fast clean tail, dry, no ambience, mobile sci-fi FPS weapon SFX.
Hot burst-fire plasma carbine shot, compact red-orange triple energy pop fused into one punchy blast, crisp transient, short aggressive tail, dry, no ambience, mobile sci-fi FPS weapon SFX.

Instrumental loopable mobile sci-fi FPS combat track for a steel arena with alien targets, longer 48 second structure, dark industrial groove, tight electronic drums, pulsing bass, metallic percussion, tense heroic synth motif, no vocals, uncluttered mix for gameplay, seamless loop ending.

Original instrumental title-screen loop for a mobile landscape sci-fi arcade FPS called Gadget Rift. Make it louder and more intense than the previous playful title music: aggressive industrial metal energy, low-tuned chugging electric guitars, tight double-kick drums, metallic percussion, gritty synth bass, glitchy arcade arps, heroic sci-fi hook, lime-energy portal shimmer, compact game-menu structure with a strong first 10 seconds and seamless looping ending. Keep it video-game-like, clean enough for phone speakers, no vocals, no choir, no copyrighted melodies, no imitation of any specific artist or soundtrack, no horror ambience, no long quiet intro. Bright mascot adventure edge layered over heavy guitars.
[confident] Glyph at your service!
[excited] Rift sealed! Nice work!
[laughs] That was slick!
[determined] Keep moving, we got this!
[playful] Sparks up, feet fast!
[gasp] Oof! Reboot me!
[dizzy] Stars... sigils... snacks?

sources.name: Sigilbreaker Title Screen Concept Batch
sources.author: OpenAI GPT Image 2
sources.license: OpenAI generated output ownership per Terms of Use
notes: Concept images were generated through the local secret broker with gpt-image-2.
The selected PNG concept is stored as a sub-agent artifact; the runtime image is a compressed WebP.
OpenAI terms and copyright FAQ were checked on 2026-07-05; do not represent the image as human-generated.

assets.prompt: No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark. Create a mobile landscape game title background for Sigilbreaker: a ritual-tech foundry hall with a shattered metallic glyph machine embedded in the far wall, steel catwalk pieces, gridded concrete floor, and a small first-person weapon silhouette at bottom-right. Leave a clean title zone along the left side and a start-button zone under it. The image should feel like a playable FPS level, not a marketing poster.

sources.author: Sigilbreaker project via Meshy API
notes: Generated from GPT Image 2 concept 002 assessment and Meshy text-to-3D/refine/rigging/animation API calls.
Staged as a high-detail player-character source candidate only; not integrated into gameplay or initial level loading.
Headed asset playground QA passed visually, but the GLB set exceeds mobile runtime source/triangle targets and needs optimization or animation retargeting before gameplay use.
Meshy plan/license status should be reverified before final shipping; this ledger assumes generated output is usable under the account terms.

assets.prompt: Convert the selected Sigilbreaker gadget-gremlin winner design into one clean full-body front-facing A-pose reference image for Meshy image-to-3D.

sources.author: Sigilbreaker project via Meshy API
notes: Generated from the GPT Image 2 single A-pose reference image using Meshy image-to-3D, rigging, and animation APIs.
Runtime character debug uses one combined GLB with one mesh/skeleton and ten embedded animation clips.
Meshy per-animation GLBs are retained as source/intermediate files and are not loaded by the character debug runtime.
The combined GLB is 10983096B, below the duplicated animation source payload but above the 6000000B runtime target; optimize before gameplay/cutscene integration.

sources.name: Sigilbreaker Title Screen Character Refresh Concepts
sources.author: OpenAI GPT Image 2
sources.license: OpenAI generated output ownership per Terms of Use
notes: Generated through the local secret broker with gpt-image-2 edit using the selected main character preview and selected mock 03 as inputs.
Mock 03 was chosen as the final title direction; a second GPT Image 2 edit removed the character from mock 03 to create the runtime background plate.
Runtime overlays the live Three.js idle character and real HTML title/buttons over the background plate.
OpenAI terms apply; do not represent the concept images as human-generated.

assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile landscape game title screen mock reference
Input image 1 role: selected main character visual reference only; preserve warm amber fur, cream face/tail tip, cobalt scarf/cloth, dark gear, lime tech accents, playful confident mascot energy.
Primary request: Create a polished mobile landscape title screen composition for Sigilbreaker, with this mascot hero as the visual anchor on the right side and a clean empty title/UI zone on the left for live HTML text and buttons.
Scene/backdrop: warm industrial sci-fi launch bay, brushed gunmetal floor, soft amber key lights, lime energy sigil aura behind the hero, subtle cobalt-blue accents.
Subject: the gadget-gremlin mascot in a relaxed idle pose, smiling, readable full upper body, no weapon in hand.
Style/medium: high-detail stylized 3D game key art mock, mascot platformer energy mixed with mobile FPS UI restraint.
Composition/framing: 2048x1024 wide phone landscape, hero on right third, left third intentionally darker and uncluttered, bottom area clear for start controls, safe margins for notches.
Lighting/mood: lighter playful adventure mood, warm rim light, lime aura glow, not horror, not gritty.
Color palette: amber, cream, cobalt, lime, gunmetal, small magenta/coral energy sparks.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no UI labels; do not copy or reference existing franchises; no dark unreadable background; no extra characters.
Avoid: fake buttons, fake title typography, unreadable clutter, realistic humans, gore, brand symbols.
assets.selectionRationale: Strong readable left side and clear hero/aura placement, but slightly heavier industrial tone than the selected direction.

assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile landscape game title screen mock reference
Input image 1 role: selected main character visual reference only; preserve warm amber fur, cream muzzle/tail, cobalt cloth, lime wrist/gear accents, mischievous brows.
Primary request: Create a title screen mock where the mascot stands on a floating steel platform with an animated-looking lime/cobalt aura ring and small bouncing-energy particles around where live title letters will appear.
Scene/backdrop: bright tech-temple chamber with curved metal panels, stylized energy rails, soft sky-blue highlights through vents.
Subject: mascot hero on right side, idle-alt-like casual bounce posture, grin, tail visible, one hand on hip, one wrist bracer glowing.
Style/medium: stylized 3D game UI mock, energetic mascot adventure tone with clean mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 2048x1024 wide, left side has empty layered panels and negative space for live title; right side hero large but not covering controls; bottom corners clear.
Lighting/mood: playful, inviting, energetic, launch-screen feel after loading completes.
Color palette: cobalt blue, lime green, amber fur tones, warm cream, charcoal metal, small coral highlights.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark; no copyrighted franchise references; background must support real HTML title over it.
Avoid: fake typography, fake interface copy, dark horror tone, over-busy neon noise, multiple mascots.
assets.selectionRationale: Best playful cobalt/lime/amber color balance; useful palette reference, but the title zone is more visually active.

assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile landscape game title screen mock reference
Input image 1 role: selected main character visual reference only; preserve the mascot's amber fur, swept hair, fox-like tail, cobalt scarf, dark utility gear, lime tech glow.
Primary request: Create a cleaner, more premium title screen mock with the mascot stepping forward from a circular lime sigil portal, designed for a live Three.js character to stand in the same place later.
Scene/backdrop: steel-and-glass sigil observatory, bright teal light shafts, polished floor reflections, soft amber uplight.
Subject: mascot on right-center foreground, idle stance, expressive eyes, confident grin, full body visible with room above ears.
Style/medium: high-quality stylized 3D render mock, polished mobile game title composition.
Composition/framing: 2048x1024 landscape, left 40 percent reserved as simple readable title/button space, hero centered right, aura behind but not covering face.
Lighting/mood: lighter wonder/adventure, clean, optimistic, not combat-heavy.
Color palette: warm amber hero, cobalt scarf, lime aura, teal haze, graphite panels, cream title-zone glow.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark; do not imitate named games or existing characters; no weapons.
Avoid: cluttered UI, dark bunker-only look, fake title words, overexposed face, cropped tail/ears.
assets.selectionRationale: Selected direction because it keeps the left title zone clean while giving the hero a bright readable aura and premium title-screen framing.

assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile landscape game title screen mock reference
Input image 1 role: selected main character visual reference only; preserve mascot identity and color scheme.
Primary request: Create an arcade-energy title screen mock with a playful transition feeling: empty metallic letter slots and glowing motion streaks implying the title will bounce in with CSS, while the mascot idles beside them.
Scene/backdrop: compact spaceship-garage arena, curved orange safety rails, cobalt panels, lime sigil sparks, clean metal floor.
Subject: mascot hero on right, three-quarter pose, big silhouette, tail visible, wrist bracer glow, cheerful ready-to-play expression.
Style/medium: stylized 3D game key art mock with mobile landscape UI planning.
Composition/framing: 2048x1024, title animation area on upper-left and center-left kept empty/no actual letters, start-button area below kept clear, hero right and slightly overlapping aura.
Lighting/mood: bright, upbeat, kinetic, more friendly than combat screen.
Color palette: amber/cream/cobalt/lime with gunmetal base and small coral highlights.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark; no fake UI text; no existing franchise likenesses.
Avoid: overly dark scene, dense particles over the UI zone, extra characters, blurry stock-art look.
assets.selectionRationale: Good kinetic streak and bounce-letter reference, but too busy and fake-UI heavy for the final runtime title.

assets.sourceFile: GPT Image 2 edited WebP background plate from selected mock 03 with character removed
assets.prompt: Edit the provided Sigilbreaker/Gadget Rift title mock into a clean runtime background plate. Remove the mascot character completely, including body, face, tail, hands, ears, hair, shadow, and any character silhouettes. Fill the removed area naturally with the same steel-and-glass sigil observatory environment, polished floor reflections, teal light shafts, graphite panels, and circular lime/cobalt/amber aura portal. Preserve the overall composition: left 40 percent must remain dark, simple, and readable for live HTML title text and buttons; right-center should keep a clear staging area where a live 3D character can stand later; the circular aura should sit behind that future character position without covering the face area. Keep the lighter playful adventure mood and warm amber/cobalt/lime/gunmetal palette. No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no fake UI, no characters, no weapons.

assets.sourceFile: GPT Image 2 edited WebP background plate from selected mock 03 with character removed

Keep the lighter playful adventure mood and warm amber/cobalt/lime/gunmetal palette. No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no fake UI, no characters, no weapons.
